items.summary: Update the homepage "Tickets & Passes" UI (in `frontend/src/components/sections/InfoLocationSection.tsx`) to include five additional pass options with the exact names, price/inclusion text, and descriptions specified in the conversation: (1) Content Creator Pass ($4) with a creator/influencer-focused description; (2) Touch Pass (Included with Regular Pass; ask to upgrade) with a description about interactive/touch-allowed elements; (3) Skip the Line Pass ($34) with a description about priority entry; (4) Blackout Pass (Included with ticket) with a description warning guests who are afraid of the dark; (5) Kid Pass ($8) with a description for younger guests/family-friendly access. Keep existing passes already shown unless explicitly removed by the user.

Make the pass options selectable on the homepage Tickets & Passes section, and provide a clear call-to-action to "secure" the selected pass (UI-only). Selection should be obvious and accessible (keyboard navigable), and the CTA must not require implementing payments.
